description: Fix 13 issues from code review: incomplete @acme rename, broken tsconfig, IDOR security vulnerability, AudioContext leaks, Safari sampleRate, encoder constants, morse tree collisions, decoder state corruption, spectrogram performance, missing Suspense boundary, and more

userStories.title: Fix incomplete @acme rename in turbo generator templates and Expo postcss
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the remaining @acme references in turbo templates and Expo config fixed so the rename is complete.
userStories.notes: 4 files were missed during the original rename. These are all simple string replacements.

userStories.title: Update README to remove stale @acme references
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the README updated so documentation commands reference @moris-bot instead of @acme.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md line 72: remove or update the 'rename @acme' paragraph since rename is already done
grep -r '@acme' across all source files (*.ts, *.tsx, *.json, *.mjs, *.hbs, *.md, *.css) returns zero results excluding node_modules and pnpm-lock.yaml

userStories.title: Fix morse-decoder tsconfig to emit dist output
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the morse-decoder package tsconfig to extend compiled-package.json so tsc actually produces declaration files in dist/.
acceptanceCriteria: Running 'pnpm --filter @moris-bot/morse-decoder build' produces files in packages/morse-decoder/dist/
userStories.notes: base.json has noEmit: true which prevents any output. compiled-package.json overrides this with declaration: true, emitDeclarationOnly: true, outDir: dist.

userStories.title: Fix IDOR vulnerability in session delete and getById
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the session tRPC router to verify user ownership on delete and getById to prevent unauthorized access.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/api/src/router/session.ts delete mutation: where clause uses and(eq(DecodedSession.id, input), eq(DecodedSession.userId, ctx.session.user.id))
packages/api/src/router/session.ts getById query: where clause uses and(eq(DecodedSession.id, input.id), eq(DecodedSession.userId, ctx.session.user.id))
userStories.notes: Security fix. Currently any authenticated user can delete/read any session by guessing the ID.

userStories.title: Fix AudioContext leak on recording setup error
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the useAudioInput hook to clean up resources if setup fails partway through.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/nextjs/src/hooks/use-audio-input.ts catch block: closes audioContextRef.current if set
Catch block stops media stream tracks via streamRef.current?.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())
Catch block nulls out all refs (audioContextRef, streamRef, sourceNodeRef, workletNodeRef)
userStories.notes: If addModule or createMediaStreamSource throws, the AudioContext and stream are leaked since isRecording stays false and stopRecording won't be called.

userStories.title: Fix Safari sampleRate mismatch
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the audio input hook to detect the actual AudioContext sample rate and expose it so the decoder uses the correct rate.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/nextjs/src/hooks/use-audio-input.ts: after creating AudioContext, read audioContext.sampleRate as actual rate
Hook return value includes actualSampleRate: number | null (null when not recording)
Decoder panel or useMorseDecoder uses the actual sample rate when configuring the decoder instead of the hardcoded default
userStories.notes: Safari may ignore the sampleRate parameter and use hardware default (44100/48000). The Goertzel filter frequency calc will be completely wrong if the decoder assumes 8000 but receives 44100.

userStories.title: Add elementGap constant and fix morse tree prosign collisions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TIMING_RATIOS to have an explicit elementGap constant, and the morse tree to not map ITU prosigns to unrelated ASCII characters.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/morse-decoder/src/encoder.ts: change 'dit * TIMING_RATIOS.dit' to 'dit * TIMING_RATIOS.elementGap' for element gap calculation
packages/morse-decoder/src/morse-tree.ts: remove '.-...' -> '&' mapping with comment explaining it's ITU AS (wait) prosign
packages/morse-decoder/src/morse-tree.ts: remove '...-..-' -> '$' mapping with comment noting it's non-ITU
userStories.notes: Two small fixes in the morse-decoder package combined into one story since they're both quick constant/data changes.

userStories.title: Fix updateConfig state corruption in decoder
userStories.description: As a developer, I need updateConfig() to reset decoder transition state when DSP components are rebuilt.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/morse-decoder/src/decoder.ts updateConfig method: after rebuilding components, resets prevToneActive = false, lastTransitionMs = null, currentElements = []
decodedText is NOT cleared (only transition state is reset, preserving decoded output)
userStories.notes: Without this, if updateConfig is called mid-character, the stale prevToneActive=true with a fresh envelope detector (starts toneActive=false) causes a spurious transition.

userStories.title: Fix spectrogram unbounded queue during file processing
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the spectrogram to handle rapid data inflow without unbounded memory growth.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/nextjs/src/app/_components/spectrogram.tsx: replace while(queue.length) { queue.shift() } with const items = queue.splice(0) to drain entire queue at once
Only paint the last CANVAS_WIDTH entries from the drained array (skip excess entries from fast file processing)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: During file processing, samples arrive faster than 60fps rAF can consume. queue.shift() is O(n) and the queue grows unboundedly.

userStories.title: Add Suspense boundary to sessions page
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the sessions page to wrap SessionsList in a Suspense boundary.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: SessionsList uses useSuspenseQuery but has no Suspense boundary. Client-side navigation will throw.

userStories.title: Fix isProcessing timing and verify pathFilter API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need isProcessing set before async work begins in useAudioFile, and the tRPC pathFilter() call verified.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/nextjs/src/hooks/use-audio-file.ts: move setIsProcessing(true) to before the first await (before file.arrayBuffer())
apps/nextjs/src/app/sessions/_components/sessions-list.tsx: verify trpc.session.pathFilter() works; if not, replace with { queryKey: trpc.session.list.queryOptions().queryKey }
userStories.notes: Two small fixes combined. The isProcessing shows false during audio decoding. The pathFilter may not exist in the installed tRPC version.
